overall.description: A stationary scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) depicting the Divination classroom. Students in wizard robes sit on cushions around tables with crystal balls, while warm afternoon light filters through tall Gothic windows. A character walks through the foreground midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: Divination classroom with seating cushions and crystal balls

events.description: student in yellow robe and turban enters from right foreground and walks across the room
student exits frame to the left, returning scene to static composition

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: student in yellow robes walking from right to left across the foreground
student sitting on pink cushion holding a cup or object

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting robed figures against a starry night sky
tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing afternoon light to stream in
heavy purple curtains hanging from the ceiling in loose folds
glowing crystal balls sitting on low round tables throughout the room
low circular tables supporting the crystal orbs
colorful upholstered cushions and stools where students are seated
rough-hewn stone walls with Gothic architectural details
framed paintings hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a Gothic-style divination classroom with students seated on cushions around tables holding crystal balls. Warm afternoon light filters through tall arched windows between heavy purple drapes. A large tapestry hangs on the left wall. Midway through, a student in yellow robes walks across the foreground from right to left before the scene returns to its static state.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a Gothic divination classroom that remains largely static save for a brief moment of movement. It begins with a wide view of students seated on cushions around tables with crystal balls, illuminated by warm afternoon light filtering through tall arched windows and heavy purple drapes. As the scene holds, a student in yellow robes walks across the foreground from right to left, momentarily breaking the stillness of the room. The camera then lingers on the quiet environment, including a large tapestry on the left wall, as the foreground clears and the classroom returns to its tranquil state.
